S

SceneManager - Class in com.bifasico.soduko.view
Singleton that owns the primary Stage and handles scene transitions.
selectDigitButton(int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView
Marks a digit button as selected (white fill).
SELECTED - Enum constant in enum class com.bifasico.soduko.view.GameView.CellState
 
setGiven(boolean) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Marks this cell as a given (pre-filled) cell visible from game start.
setGuess(int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Sets the value guessed by the player for this cell.
setMainStage(Stage) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.view.SceneManager
 
setMarked(boolean) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Sets the marked state for this cell.
setValue(int) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Cell
Sets the definitive solution value for this cell.
size() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.SudokuStack
Returns the number of elements currently in the stack.
start(Stage) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.Main
 
start(Stage) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.Launcher
 
startNewGame() - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.model.BoardManager
Generates a fresh board, replacing any existing game state.
SudokuStack<T> - Class in com.bifasico.soduko.model
A generic stack data structure implemented from scratch without external libraries.
SudokuStack() - Constructor for class com.bifasico.soduko.model.SudokuStack
Constructs an empty stack with the default initial capacity.
switchScene(String) - Method in class com.bifasico.soduko.view.SceneManager
Loads the given FXML file, attaches the global stylesheet, and displays the scene.
